358.issue_title: MCP tool schema audit: surface constraints to prevent first-use errors

cycles.name: C1 — ClassVar removal + A4 git_tools.py (atomic)

deliverables.description: CreateBranchInput ClassVar _git_config, configure() classmethod, and validate_branch_type field_validator removed
GitCommitInput ClassVar _git_config, configure() classmethod, and validate_commit_type field_validator removed
CreateBranchTool.input_schema override: branch_type.enum from git_config.branch_types, name.pattern from git_config.branch_name_pattern
GitCommitTool.input_schema override: commit_type.enum from git_config.commit_types
GitCommitInput model_validator enforces cycle_number not None when workflow_phase==implementation
All 5 ClassVar call sites removed: git_tools.py:140, git_tools.py:312, test_support.py:222, test_git_tools_config.py:66, test_git_tools.py:351
test_git_tools_config.py fully rewritten with A4 schema content assertions; test_git_tools.py 2 tests rewritten; test_support.py cleanup

cycles.exit_criteria: All 5 ClassVar call sites removed; CreateBranchTool and GitCommitTool input_schema overrides return correct enums/patterns from injected git_config; GitCommitInput model_validator rejects missing cycle_number for implementation phase; all tests pass; quality gates green

cycles.name: C2 — A2 static Pydantic constraints

deliverables.description: ForcePhaseTransitionInput.skip_reason and human_approval have Field(min_length=1) in addition to existing field_validator
CreateLabelInput.name has pattern constraint matching LabelConfig.validate_label_name() structural regex
CreateLabelInput.color has pattern='^[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$'
InitializeProjectInput has model_validator(mode=after) requiring custom_phases when workflow_name==custom
New tests: CreateLabelInput pattern rejection (name and color); InitializeProjectInput custom_phases conditional

cycles.exit_criteria: Pydantic rejects empty skip_reason/human_approval before execute(); CreateLabelInput rejects invalid name and color patterns at model level; InitializeProjectInput rejects custom workflow_name without custom_phases; all tests pass; quality gates green

cycles.name: C3 — A4 config-driven schema overrides + constructor injection

deliverables.description: _BaseTransitionTool.__init__ accepts workphases_config: WorkphasesConfig; both TransitionPhaseTool and ForcePhaseTransitionTool inject to_phase.enum from workphases_config.phases.keys()

InitializeProjectTool.__init__ accepts contracts_config: ContractsConfig; input_schema override injects workflow_name.enum from contracts_config.workflows.keys(); existing manual schema property refactored to super().input_schema pattern
CreateIssueTool.__init__ accepts label_config: LabelConfig, scope_config: ScopeConfig, git_config: GitConfig; input_schema override injects issue_type.enum, priority.enum, scope.enum, title.maxLength
ScaffoldArtifactTool.input_schema override injects artifact_type.enum from self.manager.registry.list_type_ids()
server.py updated: CreateIssueTool x2 call sites, _BaseTransitionTool descendants x2, InitializeProjectTool x1 all pass new config params
New tests for each input_schema override: to_phase.enum, workflow_name.enum, issue_type/priority/scope.enum, title.maxLength, artifact_type.enum

cycles.exit_criteria: All 5 A4 schema overrides produce correct enum/maxLength values from injected config; server.py call sites compile and pass correct params; no tool reads config via ClassVar or module-level loading; all existing and new tests pass; quality gates green

cycles.name: C4 — A1 description enrichments + reference docs

deliverables.description: SubmitPRTool.base field description documents 3-tier cascade: explicit value → state.json parent_branch → git_config.default_base_branch
SavePlanningDeliverablesTool and UpdatePlanningDeliverablesTool field descriptions reference validates-spec Layer 2 validation structure
AddLabelsTool.labels field description mentions label naming constraints
CreateMilestoneTool.due_on description specifies ISO 8601 datetime format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ)
ValidateDTOTool tool description accurately states file-exists check scope (not structural DTO validation)
TransitionPhaseTool.to_phase and ForcePhaseTransitionTool.to_phase A1 descriptions include compact get_work_context() pointer
docs/reference/mcp/tools/ reference pages updated for all 14 modified tools

cycles.exit_criteria: All 8 A1 description gaps resolved; all 14 modified tools have updated reference docs; no test changes required; quality gates green on all changed files

cycles.name: C5 — Q9 config-driven cycle_number enforcement

deliverables.description: GitCommitInput.require_cycle_number_for_implementation @model_validator removed
GitCommitTool.__init__ accepts phase_contract_resolver: IPhaseContractResolver | None = None

execute() runtime guard: after workflow_phase is resolved (both paths), load state via get_state() if not already loaded; call phase_contract_resolver.is_cycle_based_phase(state.workflow_name, workflow_phase); if True and cycle_number is None return ToolResult.error with actionable message. Guard is skipped silently when _phase_contract_resolver or _state_engine is None.
GitCommitInput.cycle_number field description updated to: 'Cycle number (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Required when the active phase is cycle-based (e.g. implementation). Optional otherwise.'
server.py GitCommitTool constructor call updated: phase_contract_resolver=self.phase_contract_resolver added
docs/reference/mcp/tools/git.md cycle_number description updated to match new A1 wording
Regression test (auto-detect path): state.json current_phase='implementation', workflow_phase omitted, cycle_number omitted → ToolResult.error (not a commit)
Regression test (explicit path): workflow_phase='implementation' passed explicitly, cycle_number omitted, state.json has workflow_name='feature' → ToolResult.error

cycles.exit_criteria: @model_validator removed; PhaseContractResolver injected; runtime guard fires on both explicit and auto-detect paths when phase is cycle-based and cycle_number is None; guard is absent (no error) on non-cycle-based phases; field description updated; server.py wired; reference docs updated; quality gates green
